subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God, O Lord of all things and Creator of all names! I beseech Thee by the Name through which Thou didst shatter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا اله الاشیاء و خالق الاسماء اسئلک بالاسم الذی به کسرت
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
